section.heading: Secretary of Labor report
section.chapeau: Not later than January 31 of each year, the Secretary of Labor shall report to the Committees on the Judiciary of the Senate and the House of Representatives on the investigations undertaken based on—

paragraph.content: the authorities described in clauses (i) and (ii) of section 1182(n)(2)(G) of this title; and
the expenditures by the Secretary of Labor described in section 1356(v)(2)(D) of this title.

note.heading: Codification
note.p: Section was enacted as part of the H–1B Visa Reform Act of 2004, and also as part of the L–1 Visa and H–1B Visa Reform Act and the Consolidated Appropriations Act, 2005, and not as part of the Immigration and Nationality Act which comprises this chapter.

note.heading: Effective Date
note.p: Section effective 90 days after Dec. 8, 2004, see section 430 of Pub. L. 108–447, set out as an Effective Date of 2004 Amendment note under section 1182 of this title.
